data.title: Coinbase-incubated x402 payments protocol built for AIs rolls out V2
data.description:

data.title: Senate Nears Confirmation of Crypto-Friendly Leaders for CFTC and FDIC
data.description:
The U. S. Senate is preparing for a final confirmation vote on two high-profile financial regulators, Mike Selig for Chair of the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) and Travis Hill for Chair of the Federal Deposit Insurance Corp (FDIC)
source: https://www.ethnews.com/senate-nears-confirmation-of-crypto-friendly-leaders-for-cftc-and-fdic/

data.title: CFTC Scraps ‘Outdated’ Bitcoin Guidance – What This Means for Future Regulation
data.description:
The CFTC has scrapped outdated guidance on Bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies, replacing it with modernized regulatory frameworks and a pilot program that allows major digital assets as collateral in US derivatives markets.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/cftc-withdraws-outdated-bitcoin-crypto-guidance/

data.title: Binance Expands USD1’s Footprint Across Its Platform

source: https://www.bankless.com/read/news/binance-expands-usd1s-footprint-across-its-platform

data.title: CryptoQuant: Short-Term Bitcoin Holders Face One of the Deepest Drawdowns of 2025
data.description:
CryptoQuant reports that short-term Bitcoin holders are in one of the deepest loss zones of 2025, with prices sitting 10% below their realized level — a pattern historically seen near market reversals.
source: https://btcusa.com/cryptoquant-short-term-bitcoin-holders-face-one-of-the-deepest-drawdowns-of-2025/

source: https://ambcrypto.com/memecoin-markets-enter-a-deep-freeze-as-dominance-collapses-to-multi-year-lows/

data.title: Bitcoin liquidity is drying up in specific regions as a new “pay-to-exit” model quietly takes over
data.description:
Belarus expanded platform blocking in December, tightening access to exchanges and reinforcing a High-Tech Park perimeter for residents. The move fits a wider access playbook across EMEA and APAC that now uses telecom blocklists, app-store removals, and KYC gates to shape who reaches the same BTC and USDT order books.
source: https://cryptoslate.com/bitcoin-liquidity-is-drying-up-in-specific-regions-as-a-new-pay-to-exit-model-quietly-takes-over/

data.title: Do Kwon sentenced to 15 years for Terra/Luna fraud
data.description:
Do Kwon, the founder and former CEO of Terraform Labs, has been sentenced to 15 years in prison for his role in the approximately $100 billion collapse in valuation of the Terra/Luna system, according to updates from Matthew Russell of Inner City Press.
source: https://protos.com/do-kwon-sentenced-to-15-years-for-terra-luna-fraud/

data.title: Do Kwon Sentenced To 15 Years in Prison Over $40 Billion Terra Crypto Collapse
data.description:
Terraform Labs founder Do Kwon was sentenced to 15 years in prison, following the $40 billion collapse of UST and Luna in May 2022.
source: https://decrypt.co/352066/do-kwon-sentenced-15-years-prison-40-billion-terra-crypto-collapse

data.title: Do Kwon Sentenced to 15 Years in U.S. Prison for $40 Billion Terra Fraud
data.description:
Terraform Labs co-founder Do Kwon has been sentenced to 15 years in federal prison, marking one of the most consequential criminal outcomes in the history of digital assets. The sentence, delivered by U. S. District Judge Paul Engelmeyer in New York, follows Kwon’s guilty plea for fraud and conspiracy tied to the collapse of TerraUSD (UST) […] The post Do Kwon Sentenced to 15 Years in U
source: https://www.ethnews.com/do-kwon-sentenced-to-15-years-in-u-s-prison-for-40-billion-terra-fraud/

data.title: US Senators make ‘real progress’ on sweeping crypto market bill following talks with bank execs
data.description:
Sen. Scott said "real progress" is being made to pass a massive cryptocurrency bill into law after meeting with top bank CEOs on Thursday.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/382277/us-senators-make-real-progress-on-sweeping-crypto-market-bill-following-talks-with-bank-execs?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: CME Predicts Fed's Interest Rate Decisions for Early Next Year
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, CME's "FedWatch" tool indicates a 24.4% probability of the Federal Reserve cutting interest rates by 25 basis points in January next year, while the likelihood of maintaining the current rates stands at 75.6%. By March, the probability of a cumulative 25 basis point rate cut increases to 40.4%, with a 52% chance of rates remaining unchanged. Additionally, there is a 7.6% probability of a cumulative 50 basis point rate cut by March.

data.title: State Street and Galaxy Digital tap Ondo Finance for money market fund RWA push
data.description:
State Street Investment Management, Galaxy Digital, and Ondo Finance have announced a partnership to launch the State Street Galaxy Onchain Liquidity Sweep Fund (SWEEP), a tokenized private liquidity fund. According to the official announcement from Ondo Finance, SWEEP is expected to make its debut on Solana early next year. The leading tokenization firm said that […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/state-street-galaxy-ondo-finance-rwa/
